intro: Treasures of Egypt await your match!
description:
Gems of Egypt is an exciting match-3 puzzle where gems of different shapes fall from above, and your goal is to line up three or more stones to clear them from the board.

Plan your moves, react quickly to the falling pieces, and create powerful matches to score higher and keep the board under control. With simple rules, smooth gameplay, and an authentic ancient Egypt atmosphere, the game is perfect for both quick sessions and long relaxing play.
